name: Moonlight Cake
recipeInstructions: Sift the flour before measuring, then sift five times. Sift sugar five times. Add salt to egg whites, beat until frothy, then add cream of tartar. Continue beating, until egg whites are stiff but not dry. In another bowl, beat 7 egg yolks until creamy. Gradually fold in beaten egg whites. Gradually add sugar while stirring. Combine the yellow and white mixtures. Fold in lemon extract and flour. Rinse a 4-1/2 x 10-inch tube pan with cold water before placing it in batter. Bake at 325 degrees for 60 to 65 minutes, or until done.
